title: Suffix Icons
description: The trailing type glyphs — the single mark a sidebar row gets when the page is not markdown: an HTML artifact or a diagram page. Markdown is the unmarked default. This two-key glyph vocabulary (diagram, artifact) is shared by both the docs sidebar (fileType) and the issue sub-doc tree (docType), with the real SVGs inlined from framework source. Leading marks live in the Issues artifact.

artifact.purpose: Document the trailing type-glyph vocabulary shared by the docs sidebar and the issue sub-doc tree — the two keyed exceptions (diagram, artifact) that mark a non-markdown page, with markdown as the unmarked default. Leading marks (badges, kind symbols, status icons, chevron) are covered by the Issues artifact.
artifact.interactions: none — static explainer; re-themes live via the host site's light/dark toggle (no artifact-local JS)
